metadata.title: Synaply - Funda Silulumagama nge-AI & Isikhala Sokuphindaphinda
metadata.description: Thuthukisa amakhono akho olimi ngesikhala sokuphindaphinda esisizwa yi-AI. Yakha uhlu lwamagama akho noma ufunde ohlwini lomphakathi olwabiwe.
metadata.keywords: funda isiNgisi, isikhala sokuphindaphinda, umakhi wesilulumagama, amakhadi okufunda, ukufunda ulimi nge-AI, uhlu lwamagama, uhlelo lokusebenza lokufunda ulimi, funda isiSpanish, funda isiFulentshi, funda isiJalimane, ubuchule bolimi, ngeza amagama ekhanda, ukufunda kwe-SRS
metadata.og_description: Thuthukisa amakhono akho olimi ngesikhala sokuphindaphinda esisizwa yi-AI. Funda ngokushesha, khumbula isikhathi eside.
metadata.og_image_alt: I-interface yoHlelo lokusebenza lokufunda ulimi lwe-AI lwe-Synaply
metadata.twitter_description: Joyina i-Synaply ukuze wandise isilulumagama sakho usebenzisa isikhala sokuphindaphinda esihlakaniphile ne-AI.

common.title: Isihloko
common.footer_help_text: Help us improve! Share your ideas, report bugs, or request features:

dashboard.title: Ideshibhodi
dashboard.subtitle: Ufunda i-{target} kusuka ku-{source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Hlola uhlu lwamagama omphakathi nezinhlu zokudlalayo ezivela kwabanye abasebenzisi.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Thuthukisa isilulumagama sakho ngokuhumusha imisho eyakhiwe yi-AI isuselwa kunoma iyiphi isihloko noma uhlu lwakho lwamagama.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Buka, sesha, hlela noma ususe amagama eqoqweni lakho.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Asikwazanga ukugcina igama lakho elisha. Ake sizame futhi!
dashboard.select_topic_error: Sicela ukhethe isihloko noma ufake owakho umongo.
dashboard.delete_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa leli gama?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa wonke amagama akho? Lesi senzo ngeke sihoxiswe.
dashboard.no_words_found: Awekho amagama atholakele. Zama igama lokusesha elihlukile noma engeza amanye amagama!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Awekho amagama atholakele ozofunda. Sicela uqale ufake amagama amasha ohlwini lwakho!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Awunawo amagama ozowabuyekeza namuhla. Buya kamuva noma ufake amagama amasha!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Umsebenzi omuhle! Ubuyekeze amagama akho anamuhla.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Faka isihloko ukuze wakhe imisho yokuprakthiza yakho wedwa!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Uma ukushiya kungenalutho kuzokwakha imisho kususelwa kusilulumagama sakho.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Sizize sithuthuke! Yabelana ngemibono yakho, bika amaphutha, noma ucele izici ezintsha:
dashboard.support_desc: Uma uthanda lolu hlelo lokusebenza, ungasekela ukuthuthukiswa kwalo.

onboarding.journey_begins: Uhambo lwakho lokufunda ulimi luqala lapha.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Ukuze uthole okuningi ku-Synaply, sincoma leli qhinga elilula:
onboarding.step1_desc: Engeza cishe amagama ayi-100 ahlobene nesihloko esisodwa (isib., Ibhizinisi noma Ukuvakasha) ukuze wakhe umongo onamandla.
onboarding.step2_desc: Funda la magama ngokusebenzisa ukuphindaphinda kwansuku zonke baze babe yingxenye yesilulumagama sakho.
onboarding.step3_desc: Shintshela ku-AI Practice ukuze usebenzise isilulumagama sakho esisha emishweni egcwele nasezimweni zomhlaba wangempela.

dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: isib. Amagama omhlangano webhizinisi mayelana nokukhangisa
dashboard.publish_desc: Yabelana ngaleli qoqo lamagama ayi-{count} nabanye abasebenzisi. Lizobonakala kugalari yeZinhlu zoMphakathi.
dashboard.inline_add_error: Sicela unikeze kokubili igama langempela nokuhumusha
dashboard.save_batch_success: Amagama ayi-{count} agcinwe ngempumelelo ohlwini lwakho!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Kuhlulekile ukugcina amagama. Sicela uzame futhi.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Sicela ususe amagama aphindaphindiwe ngaphambi kokugcina.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Sicela ususe amagama aphindaphindiwe ngaphambi kokushicilela.

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: I-AI ithatha ikhefu elifushane lekhofi. Sicela uzame futhi emva kwesikhashana!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Ups! Asikwazanga ukuthola imininingwane ye-AI. Ake sizame futhi!

public_lists.title: Uhlu Lwamagama Lomphakathi
public_lists.subtitle: Hlola uhlu lwamagama olwakhiwe abanye abasebenzisi ngezilimi zakho.
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Zama ukusesha okuhlukile noma ushintshe izihlungi zakho zolimi.

detail.title: Imininingwane yoHlu
detail.delete_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lolu hlu lomphakathi? Lesi senzo ngeke sihoxiswe.
detail.duplicate_error: Kunamagama aphindaphindiwe ohlwini. Sicela uwasuse ngaphambi kokugcina.

profile.terms_welcome: Siyakwamukela ku-Synaply. Ngokusebenzisa izinsiza zethu, uyavumelana nale migomo...
profile.title: Izilungiselelo Zephrofayili
profile.leave_empty: Shiya kungenalutho ukuze ugcine iphasiwedi yamanje
profile.subtitle: Phatha ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu nezilungiselelo zolimi
profile.terms_beta_warning: Important Beta Notice: Synaply is currently in its beta testing phase. By using this service, you acknowledge that you are participating in a testing period and understand the risks associated with pre-release software.
profile.terms_intro_text: By accessing or using Synaply, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
profile.terms_beta_text: Synaply is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis for beta testing purposes. You explicitly acknowledge and agree that: (a) The service may contain bugs, errors, and experience frequent interruptions. (b) We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice. (c) CRITICAL: During the beta period, we may perform database resets or deletions. This means all your data, including progress, word lists, and account information, may be permanently deleted without prior warning. You are responsible for maintaining your own backups of any important data.
profile.terms_accounts_text: To use certain features, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
profile.terms_content_text: Our service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, or other material. You are responsible for the content you post. Synaply retains all rights to its original content, features, and functionality, which are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
profile.terms_conduct_text: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform or participate in any unlawful acts. You shall not attempt to interfere with the proper working of the service, including through viruses, denial of service attacks, or any other harmful technology.
profile.terms_liability_text: In no event shall Synaply, nor its directors, employees, partners, or agents, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the service.
profile.terms_changes_text: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect for significant changes. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
profile.terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through the support channels provided on the website.

best_practice.title: Indlela Engcono Yokuzuza Impumelelo
best_practice.strategy_desc: Ukuze uthole ulwazi oluhle kakhulu lokufunda, sincoma leli qhinga elilula elinezinyathelo ezi-3:
best_practice.step1_desc: Engeza cishe amagama ayi-100 ugxile esihlokweni esisodwa (isib., Ukuvakasha noma Ibhizinisi) ukuze wakhe umongo.
best_practice.step2_desc: Funda la magama ngokusebenzisa ukuphindaphinda kwansuku zonke baze babe yingxenye yesilulumagama sakho.
best_practice.step3_desc: Shintshela ku-AI Practice ukuze usebenzise isilulumagama sakho esisha emishweni egcwele nasezimweni zomhlaba wangempela.

getting_started.title: Ukuqalisa
getting_started.desc: I-Synaply iyithuluzi elinamandla elakhelwe ukukusiza wandise isilulumagama sakho futhi uthuthukise amakhono akho olimi usebenzisa isikhala sokuphindaphinda nobuhlakani bokufakelwa.
getting_started.step1_desc: Engeza amagama mathupha noma usebenzise i-AI ukuze wakhe uhlu ngezihloko namazinga.
getting_started.step2_desc: Sebenzisa Ukubuyekezwa Kwesilulumagama ukuze ubambe amagama ekhanda usebenzisa i-algorithm ye-FSRS.

manual.title: Ukufaka Mathupha
manual.desc: Faka igama ngolimi olufundayo kanye nokuhumusha kwalo. Ungengeza amazwana noma umongo ukuze ukukhumbule kangcono.

auto_translate.title: Ukuhumusha ngokuzenzakalelayo
auto_translate.desc: Sebenzisa isici esithi "Auto-translate" ukuze uthole ukuhumusha kwamanje usebenzisa isevisi ye-DeepL.

ai_list.title: Ukwakhiwa koHlu (Uhlu Lwamagama lwe-AI)
ai_list.desc: Khetha izinga (A1-C2) nesihloko, bese i-AI (Gemini) izokwakhela uhlu lwamagama afanele, angangezwa kusichazamazwi sakho ngokuchofoza okukodwa.

ai_insights.title: Imininingwane ye-AI
ai_insights.desc: Egameni ngalinye, i-AI ingakunikeza omqondofana, izibonelo zokusetshenziswa, namathiphu ohlelo lolimi.

spaced_repetition.title: Isikhala Sokuphindaphinda
spaced_repetition.desc: I-Synaply isebenzisa i-algorithm ye-FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) ukubala isikhathi esikahle sokuphinda igama ngalinye.
spaced_repetition.step2: Faka ukuhumusha bese ucindezela u-Enter noma Hlola Impendulo.
spaced_repetition.step3: Uma ungakhumbuli — chofoza u-"Angikhumbuli" ukuze ubone impendulo.
spaced_repetition.step4: I-algorithm izophinda ibale usuku lokubuyekeza okulandelayo kususelwa empendulweni yakho.

ai_practice.title: Ukuprakthiza nge-AI: Ukuhumusha Imisho
ai_practice.desc: Lolu shintsho lusiza ukuqeqesha uhlelo lolimi nomongo ngokuhumusha imisho egcwele eyakhiwe yi-AI ikakhulukazi wena.
ai_practice.step2: I-AI izokwakha imisho eyisi-5 esihlokweni esikhethiwe.
ai_practice.step3: Thumela ukuhumusha kwakho bese uthola ukuchazwa okuningiliziwe.
ai_practice.step4: I-AI izokhomba amaphutha futhi iphakamise ukuhumusha okuhle kakhulu nezincazelo.

dictionary_management.title: Ukuphathwa Kwesichazamazwi
dictionary_management.search: Sesha: Sebenzisa ibha yokusesha ukuze uthole amagama ngokushesha eqoqweni lakho.
dictionary_management.sorting: Ukuhlunga: Buka uhlu lwawo wonke amagama akho ngenketho yokuwasusa.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Susa wonke amagama: Amandla okusula isichazamazwi sakho ngokuphelele ngokuchofoza okukodwa.

progress.title: Inqubekelaphambili Namaphuzu
progress.desc: Amaphuzu akho (kusehedi lohlelo lokusebenza) akhombisa inani lamazwi ahunyushwe kahle. Uma amaphuzu ephakeme, yilapho usufunde khona amagama amaningi ngempumelelo!

not_authorized_admin: You do not have administrator permissions to view this page.
